$comment: Performance budget (TASK-015, PRD KPIs). 'limits' are the PRD targets. 'gated' lists the KPIs that fail CI on regression — only 'bundle' is gated because a GUI app's cold-start and idle RAM can't be measured reliably on a headless CI runner (no display, runner variance); those are measured and recorded as baselines but not hard-failed. 'baseline' holds the last locally-recorded measurements for tracking drift over time.
